title: USS Gerald R. Ford Ends Record Deployment and Heads Home
summary: The USS Gerald R. Ford, world's largest aircraft carrier, departs the Middle East after a record 309-day deployment amid tensions with Iran.
contents:
## USS Gerald R. Ford Ends Record Deployment and Heads Home

### Overview
The USS Gerald R. Ford, world's largest aircraft carrier, departs the Middle East after a record 309-day deployment amid tensions with Iran.

### Details
US officials announce the carrier leaves the Red Sea region in coming days for Naval Station Norfolk by mid-May. The deployment, starting June 2025, surpasses previous post-Vietnam records amid operations against Iran and regional blockades. Crew faces fatigue and technical issues during the extended mission with two other carriers present.

### Geographic context
Location: Red Sea, Middle East.
